title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: Venngage AI is a tool for generating one-pagers and marketing documents from text prompts, automating content, design, visuals, and PDF export in a single workflow. The video demonstrates creating a client-ready pitch document entirely through AI-assisted design.
writeup: This video demonstrates Venngage AI, a tool that turns text prompts into one-pagers and marketing documents, and walks through building a client-ready pitch from prompt to PDF export. It covers the full workflow: generating content, design, and visuals, then exporting, all within a single AI-assisted process. The takeaway is that a complete pitch document can be assembled through prompt-to-document automation rather than manual layout work.
